title: Need help designing a CRM system for our business

posts.author: simplybrands (Simplybrands)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We are currently looking for someone to help us design a CRM system for our Sales, Marketing, Sourcing, Finance teams to work together from one place.

We were wondering if there is anybody here who specialises in creating such systems, using automations, integrations etc

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @simplybrands!

You can check out our partners directory here, https://monday.com/p/find-a-partner/. Our partners are experts in building out workflows and customising your account as per your needs
